name: Yash Kabra
title: Senior Quality Assurance Engineer
summary: Experienced QA professional with 8+ years in manual and automation testing across web, mobile, and APIs. Strong in test strategy, framework development, CI/CD integration, and driving measurable quality improvements.

highlights: Built and maintained Python + Selenium + PyTest automation framework
API testing with Python Requests; BDD with Behave
CI/CD with Jenkins & GitHub Actions; ~30% faster releases
Raised reliability ~20% across Computesphere, Calen360, CipherAuth, Xerinn
Cut testing time ~30%; improved workflow efficiency ~15%
E2E automation in Python/Selenium; API automation with Requests
Functional, manual, usability testing; ~15% user satisfaction boost
Python-based mobile app automation; POM in Selenium
Wrote feature files & step definitions; automated test execution
